sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45857" key="e)fulakte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφῠλακτέω</orth>, <sense id="n45857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bark at</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.551c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
